texto: I was a sophomore in college, and I did an industrial video about how to use the Internet - that dates me! It was with John Turturro, somehow they had gotten John Turturro to do this thing, and I was so excited and so nervous I probably drank 10 cups of coffee that morning.
explicacao: Citação de Warren Kole sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I was a sophomore in college, and I did an industrial video about how to use the Internet - that …” articula reflexao, coffee, college em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e college.

frase_original: I was a sophomore in college, and I did an industrial video about how to use the Internet - that dates me! It was with John Turturro, somehow they had gotten John Turturro to do this thing, and I was so excited and so nervous I probably drank 10 cups of coffee that morning.
